title: Amethyst - Echoes
description: Adds a new cave biome filled with amethyst-themed mobs, structures, and gear. Mysterious, dangerous, and radiant.
body:
![Amethyst](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e42bad38e1aec2e8fdc210274bf33686335bcbab.png)

⚠️ Important:
- This mod requires NeoForge to work.
- This mod requires GeckoLib to work. Make sure to install it alongside the mod!
- The mod is currently at version: 1.0.1


Supported Langauges: English / Hungarian / Spanish( 1.0.0+ )



Amethyst - 1.0.1 Update:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Reworks & Fixes:
  - Crystal Jelly and Amethyst Deer spawn chance rebalanced
  - Crystal Jelly Agression trigger fix
  - Loot Tables and Drop Chances rebalanced


Amethyst - 1.0.0 Update:
- New Langauge Support: Spanish (initial version, may receive improvements in future updates, feedback and corrections are welcome)

- New Mobs: Crystal Butterfly, Crystal Jelly, Amethyst Deer

- New Items: Amethyst Talisman Mystical Jelly Radiant Dust

- New Weapons: Radiant Trident Radiant Mace

- New Potions:
  - Mystic Potion of Healing
  - Mystic Potion of Healing II
  - Mystic Potion of Blinded Hearth
  - Mystic Potion of Blinded Hearth+
  - Mystic Potion of Health Boost
  - Mystic Potion of Health Boost+
  - Mystic Potion of Health Boost II
  - Mystic Potion of Health Boost+ II
  - Mystic Potion of Health Boost III
  - Mystic Potion of Health Boost+ III

- Reworks & Fixes:
  - Amethyst Wraith Boss fight rework
  - Radiant Tools & Armor crafting recipes reworked
  - Radiant Tools & Armor 3D models
  - Amethyst Wraith boss summon animation bug fixed
  - Entity textures retouched (added glowing textures, fixed glow bugs)
  - Block behavior bugs fixed
  - Loot tables and drop chances rebalanced
  - Villager trades retouched
  - Custom sound bug fix
  - Custom killcount command retouched

</details>



 



Discover the glowing depths of the Amethyst Caverns!

This mod brings a new underground cave biome to Minecraft - filled with shimmering and mysterious creatures.


  ![Amethyst Caverns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c40709a1f9d8182aa1b5e39731ab2a71d27b619b.png)

Explore Amethyst Caverns, mysterious structures like Shrines, and Temples,
and face off against unique amethyst creatures and the powerful Amethyst Wraith Boss.

Get Radiant Amethyst Shards and craft Radiant Tools and Armor for more effective combat.

![Tools & Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a08bd1333c700e724494b72d7c8d6efa74ab98c.png)

You can get Radiant Amethyst Shards by defeating the Amethyst Wraith or the Amethyst Golem
or obtained through trading with the villager.

Radiant Amethyst Tools have +Amethyst Bonus Damage
Amethyst Bonus Damage only activates on Amethyst Mobs, added after final damage is calculated.


![A few mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b0a5dc48a8d2086c778ad96290c29b9c2409d5a.png)
   

New Villager Profession

Mystic Jeweler


![New Villager Profession](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47a6bd26294965b5f5ac0ade247e6d48bbbf2901.png)


The Radiant Tools and Armour can be both creafted and obtained through trading with the villager.

Example trades:



![Trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c95282b79d8f3db0cc98b03d7211bb58cc4d18f8.png)
   


49 New Blocks

Basalt / Calcite / Amethyst / Radiant Amethyst


![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d6ef800ac3d772ddefa63517d5c87eae0e3727f.png)

   

Advancements


![Advancments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4298fc688ee9978c81c868ad173f9bf67a8535b3.png)




List of Advancements:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
  Amethyst - Thank you for downloading the mod!
  
  Into The Shimmer - Find the amethyst biome
  
  Groove Seeker - Find any of the Music Discs
  
  The Purple Phantom - Defeat the Amethyst Wraith
  
  Whispers - Wraith's Whispers
  
  So Radiant - Find radiant amethyst shards
  
  It Shines Even More - Make a radiant amethyst block
  
  Shining Defense - Get any amethyst armor part
  
  Radiant Knight - Get all amethyst armor parts
  
  Shiny and Useful - Get any radiant amethyst tool
  
  Crystal Collection - Get all radiant amethyst tools
  
  Crystal Cleansing - Kill 10 of each amethyst creature in survival
  ( If you lost track of the kills, use the /amethystKillCounter command in the chat )
</details>






Made by: SourCanDy1438


This mod was created using MCreator.
